message:
test(fuzz): add 19 structure-aware fuzz targets across auth, CBOR, host-wire, and registry surfaces

Bulk-add fuzz targets that have already been registered as
`[[bin]]` entries in fuzz/Cargo.toml in earlier commits but whose
source files were still untracked. Each target is a self-contained
libfuzzer harness using `arbitrary::Arbitrary` for structure-aware
input generation and is intended to provide DoS-resistance and
canonical-encoding coverage for an agent-facing wire surface.

Auth / capability claims:
  - auth_claims_cbor.rs              fcp_auth_schema::AuthClaims
                                     canonical-CBOR roundtrip with
                                     re-encode-equality assertion.
  - credential_id_parse.rs           fcp_core::CredentialId parser,
                                     UTF-8-boundary aware, 256-byte
                                     input cap.
  - hash_algorithm_serde.rs          HashAlgorithm serde roundtrip.
  - device_id_roundtrip.rs           DeviceId encode/decode parity.
  - request_id_roundtrip.rs          RequestId encode/decode parity.

CRDT / mesh state:
  - crdt_merge_invariants.rs         CRDT merge associativity /
                                     commutativity / idempotency.
  - lease_coordinator_wire_format.rs lease-coordinator wire shape.
  - health_state.rs                  health-state serializer.
  - liveness_readiness_response.rs   liveness/readiness response shape.

Provisioning / registry / host:
  - registry_signed_package_catalog.rs
                                     LocalRegistryCatalog signed-package
                                     catalog parsing, including
                                     manifest-signature.json,
                                     binary_name path validation,
                                     binary hash checks, and detached
                                     signature verification.
  - provisioning_recipe_roundtrip.rs provisioning recipe roundtrip.
  - sbom_format_serde.rs             SBOM format serde.
  - secret_format_serde.rs           secret format serde.
  - tool_schema_format.rs            tool-schema format parser.
  - doctor_wire_format.rs            doctor wire format.
  - validate_source_symbols.rs       fcp_store::validate_source_symbols
                                     range gate (alternative harness;
                                     companion to the existing
                                     store_validate_source_symbols.rs).

Webhook / OAuth / auth providers:
  - webhook_delivery_status_parse.rs webhook delivery-status parser.
  - qq_access_token_response.rs      QQ OAuth access-token parser.
  - qq_path_segment.rs               QQ path-segment validator.

All targets cap input size and exercise canonical-encoding /
roundtrip invariants where applicable, so a successful
`from_canonical_*` always re-encodes to identical bytes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
